speaker: MATT
raw_text: Through the acid, it's swimming. Once you get to the actual wound, this is more squeezing. And that's going to be more of a strength-based element. So that being the case here, a poisonous snake, I'm going to need you to go ahead and roll a strength check to push against the wound.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If it would have hit-- at whatever angle it would be, even then, it's only that wide and it would still puncture a tiny slit, and due to the density of both the muscles of the creature and its body, it took damage and there's a little bit of blood coming from the wound, you imagine, but it's not like it's going to leave an open, cavernous hole.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's a cut.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's a cut.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Got it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: But you did see where it (tearing noise) through.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And when it went out, I didn't see any daylight or anything. Just disappeared.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You just saw it (tearing noise) through the creature's stomach. You do see a little bit of blood beginning to pour out of where the wound was.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Oh boy.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do it, baby.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know, I got nothing. All right, I'll just try something and we'll see if it works and then I'll try something else next time. I won't die in one round, right? I'm going to Polymorph into a Tri-- not-a-ceratops. Into a small, poisonous snake.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And I'm going to go straight into that wound.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, well, before that happens you do take four points of acid damage from the stomach before you take the form, because that would be the top of the round. So, at which point you turn into a small poisonous snake, now floating amongst the acids, and find your way along the surface. And you're heading towards the wound?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going into the wound.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, all right--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: With a swim speed of 30!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right, you do. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Let me check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But I don't know if it's swimming, it's more squeezing.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. Everyone who's climbing, I need you to roll a strength check.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS PERKINS
preceding_turns.text: Why, you, of course.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah?

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS PERKINS
preceding_turns.text: I'm past my prime.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We'll shake on it?

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS PERKINS
preceding_turns.text: I will shake on it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Which is easy because you put out the proper hand for the one arm she has.

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS PERKINS
preceding_turns.text: You want to mess with her, put out your other hand. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Shale, what type of magic do you wield, exactly?

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS PERKINS
preceding_turns.text: I wield this staff.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Very clear.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is going to be great! I'm on board and committed to this. This is very exciting!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Thank you, Shale. Let's try to live.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So remember, acid pools everywhere. Do we have any type of cohesive plan, or just--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're just going to go in.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Just be very quiet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm already looking for traps, looking for danger.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you're coming up to the entrance.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm not going to go in the entrance, but I'm going to try to climb up and peer over the edge and look as carefully as I can.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and make another strength check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You manage to climb your way up to the larger mouth of the cavern. It's about 40 feet across at the very front of it. And about 50 feet up. It's this large--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: 40 feet, 50 feet?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. And the rest of you guys? Are you pursuing?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to come.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Rest of you climbing along the mountain as well?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, is that the way in?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is there anything you can do to make the dragon visible with his invisibility? Set fire, or your faeries?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I do have Faerie Fire. You combine the two things that you said and it's fantastic.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Totally meant to. Okay. I'm just climbing. I'll follow them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. What is it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: With Pass Without a Trace? 43.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. So you're back where you were. The rest of you, what are you doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: CHRIS PERKINS
preceding_turns.text: Well, he's a mad little one, isn't he?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's not usually little. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'd like to go around the column, and around the edge of the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This opens up slightly more, and you get to see a portion of the mineral growth-- a lot of the moisture that has coalesced into the ceiling has come into a central point, and over time, it just built up these central columns of rock and natural materials. A few pools have gathered towards the base. You see portions of the ground where elements of the acrid liquid that filled the pool over here just dripped in. Whether they began this way or turned by the dragon's presence, you are unaware. But that's as far as you can see.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Further along the wall, that little rock-- yeah. And just a little bit past it. And then closer to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point, you can make out that additional pool of acid, the far back corner and a risen platform, you see the portion of the cavernous stone beginning to mass into a higher level towards the far back corner.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I listen.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 20. You listen in... Silence. Stillness. The very faint whisper of wind far behind you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Around the entire wall. Further, past that pool of acid, even. Further corner.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Has it been a minute yet?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: About half a minute.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you come around this corner, being as careful as you can, looking around you-- (impact). Your shoulder hits something.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Stab.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So that ends your turn. Everyone else, I need you to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you've still got Uncanny Dodge on one of the attacks. Just from your roguish instincts.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Displacer Cloak.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct. It gets disadvantage on the first attack, which is going to be a bite. That's a natural 19, and a two! With the two, that brings it to a 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Nope.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So with that, you (whoosh) see for a split second, the ripple of teeth snap before you, missing your face by mere inches before they disappear once again. Two more claws (whoosh) towards you. The first one, that's a 19 again and a seven. That's going to be a 22.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Just hits. Uncanny Dodge.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, your AC would be 20 because you're not hasted right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, you're right. Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So that would put you at 18 points of slashing damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Halved to nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Halved to nine. Also your displacement is gone from your cloak.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: For this round?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. For the next attack, it's a 19. Misses you? 20? Yeah. The second claw swings through, at this point, from the pain of the first strike of the dragon claw hits you, you back up to the very edge of the cave and duck out of the way as you hear the wind change. As you do, you hear the stone crash behind you as the claw misses you, slamming instead to the side of the cavern wall. It's now your turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to stay right here. I'm going to hold my turn until one of my friends is on top of this thing and then I'm going to stab it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You hold your action until one of your friends is on it and then you move? Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Not on it, but against it, attacking it. Melee attack.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, so half that. So 32 made to 16. 16 points of bludgeoning damage. I need you to go ahead and roll a concentration check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you unload on Umbrasyl, the pent-up anger and frustration, you start slashing over and over again. You guys watch as the blade shines in the air in the presence of its naturally designed enemy. You see at the corners of his outfit little tufts of dark smoke beginning to appear. The scar of Orthax still shows when the fury builds within Percy. As each blow strikes, cutting away hunks and bits of dragon flesh and scale, Umbrasyl is heavily wounded and looking desperate. That ends your turn, I believe?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, he's still alive?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys gave it time to rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Fuck it, bonus action, I'm putting on the mask and standing my ground. Fuck it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Amazing what a dragon can do in two hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'm done.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Vex.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hi. Okay. I'm going to--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Actually, at the end of Percy's turn, he's going to use his third legendary action, knowing the source of the Faerie Fire and extremely frustrated by the fact that it has lent to a very difficult round, it turns towards the now water elemental quivering before it, and the tail comes down to smash towards your liquid form.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (burbling)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Speaking of natural 20s.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Come on, bitch. Come on.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You're fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Totally fine. I'm an elemental for a reason.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You are totally fucking fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 32 points of bludgeoning damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Halved.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Halved, because of your elemental. Does water elemental have resistance to damage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it has damage resistance against acid, bludgeoning, piercing, slashing from non-magical weapons.
